releases.description: Boot ROM corrected — LOAD AL,CR15,CR15[0] → CHANGE AL,CR12,CR15,#1 → CALL AL,CR0 (cr_src=15 on CHANGE, was 12). Builder ZIP downloads fixed for all 3 boards.
releases.notes: Download the Verilog source and synthesise with Efinity 2024.1 or later. The .bit file lands in outflow/church_ti60_f225.bit.
